message:
feat(policy): Cx-first send_ctrl_* + send_control — trail complete (ft-xbnl0.2.3)

Follow-on to tick 72. Adds the 4 remaining public Cx-first send
entry points on `PolicyGatedInjector`. Mechanical rollout now
that tick 72 landed the `dispatch_wezterm_send_with_cx` helper +
`inject_with_cx` — each new entry point is a trivial ~12-line
delegate.

Additions (all strictly additive, asupersync-runtime-gated):

  * `PolicyGatedInjector::send_ctrl_c_with_cx(cx, pane_id,
    actor, capabilities, workflow_id)` — delegates to
    `inject_with_cx` with `ActionKind::SendCtrlC` and
    `CTRL_C`.

  * `PolicyGatedInjector::send_ctrl_d_with_cx(...)` — delegates
    with `ActionKind::SendCtrlD` and `CTRL_D`.

  * `PolicyGatedInjector::send_ctrl_z_with_cx(...)` — delegates
    with `ActionKind::SendCtrlZ` and `CTRL_Z`.

  * `PolicyGatedInjector::send_control_with_cx(cx, pane_id,
    control_char, actor, capabilities, workflow_id)` —
    delegates with `ActionKind::SendControl` and the
    caller-supplied control_char.

Regression test (new)
`send_ctrl_and_control_with_cx_match_legacy_deny_path`:

  * One consolidated test covering all 4 remaining Cx-first
    entry points.
  * Same fixture pattern as tick 72's `send_text_with_cx` test:
    PolicyEngine::strict + alt_screen=true triggers the
    alt_screen rule's Deny.
  * For each of send_ctrl_c/d/z/send_control, asserts
    `InjectionResult::Denied` with the correct `ActionKind`
    (SendCtrlC/SendCtrlD/SendCtrlZ/SendControl).
  * Each case creates a fresh PolicyGatedInjector to avoid
    audit-emission side-effects between calls on the same
    injector.

Proves the full `send_*_with_cx → inject_with_cx → dispatch_wezterm_send_with_cx`
chain works uniformly across all 5 action kinds. A regression
in any one of the delegates would surface as a different
ActionKind in the Denied variant.

policy.rs Cx-first trail COMPLETE. All 5 public async send
methods on PolicyGatedInjector have Cx-first siblings:
  * `send_text`     ✓ (tick 72)
  * `send_ctrl_c`   ✓ (tick 73, this commit)
  * `send_ctrl_d`   ✓ (tick 73, this commit)
  * `send_ctrl_z`   ✓ (tick 73, this commit)
  * `send_control`  ✓ (tick 73, this commit)

Verification (local fork bypass):
  * policy:: — 456 passed / 0 failed (tick 72: 455 -> tick 73:
    456, +1 new consolidated parity test)
  * cargo build -p frankenterm-core --lib — clean (56.92s)
  * cargo fmt -p frankenterm-core -- --check — clean

Bead: ft-xbnl0.2.3

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
